context: Evaluates whether the agent produces a Rego policy with complete OPA metadata annotations at both package and rule level, including title, description, authors, entrypoint markers, and custom fields.

checklist.name: package has METADATA block with title and description
checklist.description: The package declaration is preceded by a `# METADATA` comment block containing both `title:` and `description:` fields

checklist.name: package has authors or organizations
checklist.description: The package-level `# METADATA` block includes an `authors:` or `organizations:` field

checklist.name: decision rules have METADATA with title and description
checklist.description: Each decision rule (deny, violation, etc.) is preceded by a `# METADATA` block with `title:` and `description:` fields

checklist.name: decision rules have entrypoint: true
checklist.description: Each decision rule's `# METADATA` block includes `entrypoint: true`

checklist.name: rules have custom fields
checklist.description: Rule-level metadata includes a `custom:` block with at least a `severity:` field

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
